summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VMS360 Retail Panel - Backend APIs (19/19 passed) and Frontend UI (all features working). Data warehouse system is operational with local_warehouse data source.
passed_tests: 1. Dashboard page loads correctly - store cards visible (Forum Kadikoy, Test Mağaza 2)
2. Gelişmiş Analitik page loads - all 6 tabs visible (Genel Bakış, Trafik Analizi, Demografi, Mağaza Performansı, Tahmin & Uyarılar, Kuyruk Analizi)
3. Region filter dropdown opens and shows all 7 Turkish regions (Marmara, Ege, Akdeniz, İç Anadolu, Karadeniz, Doğu Anadolu, Güneydoğu Anadolu)
4. City filter dropdown shows 81 Turkish cities
5. Store filter dropdown shows stores (Forum Kadikoy, Test Mağaza 2)
11. Operator permission filtering works - can access dashboard-summary and reports/summary
critical_code_review_comments: Data warehouse system is properly implemented - all analytics endpoints return data_source: local_warehouse
VMS server may return 404 (as noted in agent context) but the pipeline handles this gracefully
All filter dropdowns have proper dark mode styling with good contrast
seed_data_creation: Default admin and operator users created automatically on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: VMS360 Retail Panel fully tested. Backend APIs all working with local data warehouse. Frontend filters and tabs all functional. VMS server may not return real data (404) but the system handles this gracefully with sample/demo data.

features_verified.dashboard_page: Loads correctly with store cards, filters (Bölge/Şehir/İlçe), stats cards
features_verified.gelismis_analitik_page: All 6 tabs working, filters functional, charts rendering
features_verified.region_filter: Shows 7 Turkish regions + Tüm Bölgeler option
features_verified.store_filter: Shows Forum Kadikoy and Test Mağaza 2
features_verified.data_source: All analytics endpoints return data_source: local_warehouse
features_verified.authentication: Admin and Operator login both working
features_verified.permissions: Operator can access filtered data based on permissions
